models.name: deepseek-r1:7b
models.description: RECOMMENDED FOR REASONING (8GB VRAM): State-of-the-art reasoning model. Ideal for the 2nd stage of the hybrid system to fix descriptions and generate complex metadata.

models.name: qwen2.5:7b
models.description: RECOMMENDED FOR LAPTOP (16GB VRAM): Current state-of-the-art 7B text model. Superior logic and knowledge for general tasks.

models.name: aispin/qwen2.5-7b-instruct-abliterated-v2.q4_k_s.gguf:latest
models.description: RECOMMENDED FOR CREATIVE FREEDOM (16GB VRAM): Special 'unfiltered' version of Qwen 2.5. Ideal for unrestricted creative tasks.

models.name: glm-ocr:latest
models.description: RECOMMENDED FOR DESKTOP (8GB VRAM): Specialist in extracting text from documents and images (OCR). Extremely fast.

models.name: qwen3-vl:4b
models.description: RECOMMENDED FOR DESKTOP (8GB VRAM): Next-gen vision model. Significant improvement in OCR and spatial understanding.

models.name: gemma4:e2b
models.description: RECOMMENDED FOR DESKTOP (8GB VRAM): Efficient multimodal model from Google with excellent performance-to-memory ratio.

models.name: llama3.2-vision:11b
models.description: RECOMMENDED FOR HIGH-END (16GB+ VRAM): Premium multimodal model from Meta. Best-in-class image reasoning.
